title: Console app: realtime kanban
description: Build a console/ React/Vite/Node app that renders Taskulus issues as a kanban board with Shadcn UI, Tailwind, Radix colors, GSAP transitions, and SSE realtime updates from project/.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implementation complete for console app and SSE pipeline. Local validation pending because node/npm not installed in this environment.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reopened epic to add console UI BDD coverage required for CI gating.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: console/ app runs locally; reads project/config.yaml and project/issues/*.json; tabs for Initiatives/Epics/Tasks; task drill-in shows sub-tasks; system light/dark mode; Radix color mapping for status/type/priority; GSAP transitions; SSE updates on project/ changes with 250ms debounce.
